meta.title: Accumulating Conveyor (blocking / back-pressure)
meta.description: Source (fast, interarrival 1.0) -> accumulating Conveyor (capacity 5) -> small Queue (capacity 1) -> slow Processor (20.0) -> Sink. The slow processor is the bottleneck; it starves the exit so the conveyor accumulates items up to its capacity and enters the 'blocked' state (back-pressure to the source). Once downstream drains, items flow at the bottleneck rate. Mirrors the [conv-accum] self-test.

expected.formula: conveyor fills to capacity (=5) and blocks; long-run throughput = 1/bottleneck_process_time = 1/20 = 0.05
expected.tolerance: occupancy exactly 5 at fill; throughput within 6%
expected.measure: Conveyor.occupancy()==5 and state=='blocked' while filling; Sink.total/elapsed ~ 0.05 per unit
